package rulecoverage

func PositivePrepareInsideLoop() string {
    ruleID := "prepare_inside_loop"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Prepare(...) or PrepareContext(...) observed inside loops."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
